name: Wild Rice-Turkey Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Red or white wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the wild rice in water until tender, about 50 minutes.
2. Cut the turkey into bite-sized pieces.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and toss gently.
4. Cover and chill until ready to serve.
5. Sprinkle chopped pecans on top just before serving.
422 calories
3 lean meat, 1 bread, 1.5 fruit, 2 fat exchanges
42 grams carbohydrate
24 grams protein
18 grams fat
344 mg sodium
503 mg potassium
54 mg cholesterol
